title: Greenidge Pod X Bitcoin Mining Solution - Innovation and Efficiency
text: Greenidge Pod X Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure. Announcement: Greenidge unveiled Pod X bitcoin mining solution at Bitcoin Conference. Advanced infrastructure designed for efficient bitcoin mining. Capacity Innovation: Pod X capacity 792 miners (35% more than other pod manufacturers). One of lowest pod and infrastructure $/kW cost ratios in industry. $158/kW versus industry standards $160-170/kW. Efficiency Design: Optimal temperatures for miners resulting in superior uptime. Better longevity of mining equipment. Improved filter design simplifies maintenance. Airflow engineered to minimize Internal Vortex Force. Neutral pressure force and low air velocities promoting miner life. Operational Features: One of lowest decibel outputs in market. Adheres to National Electrical Code NFPA 70 regulations. Full compliance with Short Circuit and Arc Flash requirements. Deployment Scale: 75 MW of Pod X containers deployed across New York South Carolina Mississippi and North Dakota. Proven operational performance across multiple locations.
